description: Look stylish in these black leather shoes from red tape. These dressy shoes are designed for comfort and look great when teamed with pants and shirts for a formal look.UpperHigh quality leather upper for comfort and durabilityClean design for a very stylish lookElasticated inserts on the sides for easy insertion and removal of the feetFabric lining for greater comfortStitch panel overlay designMidsoleCushioned footbed for all-day comfortPU midsole for lightweight comfortOutsoleTextured outsole and heel for better gripSlightly elevated heel for ergonomic comfortshoe careWipe dust using a dry, clean clothUse a branded shoe polish to keep your leather footwear clean and shinyDo not store in direct sunlight
